calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-18-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Benjamin Ehrhart, Esq. for Plaintiff W.W. Wharf GL, Inc., a Delaware Corp.
Plaintiff's Witness Sharon Gurewitz was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Sandalwood, Inc., a California corp. for an Amended Judgment as follows:
Past-due rent $25,448.92
Holdover damages $12,471.20
Attorney Fees $2,776.25
Costs $790.00, for a total of $41,486.37 and possession of the premises located at 2545 Powell St., San Francisco.
Lease is forfeited.
Amended Judgment signed in open court.
